items.title: Alphabet Sits At Center Of AI And Robotaxi Shifts
items.description: Alphabet (NasdaqGS:GOOGL) has reportedly reached an agreement for Apple to use its Gemini AI model in the next version of Siri. The arrangement would involve Apple paying Alphabet to power some Siri features with Gemini. Separately, Alphabet’s Waymo unit clarified that its robotaxis are never remotely driven and that remote staff only provide high level guidance. Waymo’s clarification is aimed at regulators and the public as scrutiny of autonomous vehicle safety and oversight continues. For...
